# Shailesh Chaudhari — Portfolio

> Software Engineer (~2.5 years) with a backend focus. Current role: backend of ContextQA's core QA-automation product (test execution engine, VNC streaming, Playwright/WebdriverIO/LambdaTest orchestration).

Shailesh Chaudhari is a Software Engineer based in Gujarat, India. BE in Information Technology from Government Engineering College Bhavnagar (2024, CGPA 7.99). Institute Rank 1 on GeeksforGeeks with 604+ problems solved.

Professional timeline:
- Jan 2024 – Aug 2024: Software Developer Intern at EsparkBiz Technologies (full-stack learning — Node.js, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind; dummy projects; real-time patterns).
- Aug 2024 – Jul 2025: Software Engineer at EsparkBiz Technologies (3 client projects end-to-end — full-stack UI, backend APIs, client communication and requirements).
- Jul 2025 – present: Software Engineer at ContextQA. First 2-3 months: shipped 2 Chrome extensions (Vibe Testing for AI-powered web testing, AxeTos for WCAG accessibility). Since then: backend of the core QA-automation product (test execution engine, VNC streaming, browser-automation orchestration via Playwright / WebdriverIO / LambdaTest).

- [Hire](https://shaileshchaudhari.vercel.app/hire): Services and engagement details

## Side projects (shipped)

Live:

- [EduScale](https://eduscale.vercel.app/): Real-time engineering learning platform with 1v1 coding battles. Backend uses @socket.io/redis-adapter (horizontal Socket.io scaling), redlock (distributed locks preventing duplicate battle starts), opossum (circuit breaker around code execution), prom-client (Prometheus /metrics), Bull queues. Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, Supabase Auth.
- [DevTrack](https://daily-dev-track.vercel.app): Developer productivity dashboard. Supabase Realtime postgres_changes subscription on daily_logs for live activity feed + sub-second multi-tab sync. Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Supabase Realtime, Recharts.
- [KhataGO](https://khatago.vercel.app/): WhatsApp-first AI accounting for Indian SMBs. WhatsApp Business webhook with Redis deduplication, Gemini AI function-calling for receipt OCR → structured transactions + receivables management. Stack: Next.js, Gemini AI SDK, WhatsApp Cloud API, PostgreSQL (Prisma), Redis, i18n (en/hi/gu).

Open-source / demo:

- [stripe-payments-demo](https://stripe-payments-demo-eight.vercel.app) — source on [GitHub](https://github.com/Shailesh93602/stripe-payments-demo): Stripe integration demo. Webhook HMAC-SHA256 verification + Redis SETNX idempotency (24h TTL covering Stripe's retry window, exactly-once processing) + caller-supplied idempotency keys on payment intent creation + exponential-backoff retry with jitter that skips 4xx. 29 tests including concurrent-duplicate simulation.
- [razorpay-patterns-demo](https://razorpay-patterns-demo.vercel.app) — source on [GitHub](https://github.com/Shailesh93602/razorpay-patterns-demo): India-accessible sibling of stripe-payments-demo. Razorpay Standard Checkout end-to-end (create-order → Checkout.js modal → verify-payment → async webhook) with HMAC-SHA256 signature verification on both the client callback (signs order_id|payment_id with KEY_SECRET) and the webhook body (signed with a separate webhook secret). SETNX idempotency guard. 30 tests across 3 suites. Interactive /demo page with Razorpay test card.
- [redis-battle-demo](https://redis-battle-demo.onrender.com/) — source on [GitHub](https://github.com/Shailesh93602/redis-battle-demo): Standalone, deployed proof-of-concept extracted from EduScale's distributed real-time engine. Express + Socket.io + @socket.io/redis-adapter (pub/sub clients) + Redlock (retryCount:0, distributed tick mutex). 48 tests. Docker Compose starts Redis locally. Live UI shows server tick events and the Redlock race in a browser.
- [CareerGlyph](https://github.com/Shailesh93602/careerglyph): Developer identity platform replacing static resumes. NestJS monorepo backend (71 tests: JWT auth, skills/projects/endorsements with compound unique key upsert, rate-limited auth). Next.js 14 frontend with public profile viewer at /[username], TanStack Query optimistic endorsements.
- [CodeSenseiSearch](https://github.com/Shailesh93602/CodeSenseiSearch): AI-powered semantic code search. NestJS backend with pgvector, function-level chunking, OpenAI embeddings, cosine-similarity ranking. Natural-language queries return ranked file+line results.

ContextQA Chrome extensions (shipped in first 2-3 months at ContextQA, 2025):

- Vibe Testing: Chrome extension for AI-powered web testing with real-time log streaming. Stack: Chrome Extension, Python AI Agent, Node.js, Socket.io.
- AxeTos: Chrome extension for WCAG A/AA/AAA accessibility testing with intelligent fix suggestions. Stack: Chrome Extension, Node.js, axe-core, AWS S3.

## Skills

TypeScript · React · Next.js · Node.js · Express.js · NestJS · PostgreSQL · MongoDB · Redis · Prisma · Tailwind CSS · Socket.io · @socket.io/redis-adapter · Redlock · Circuit Breaker (opossum) · Prometheus (prom-client) · Bull Queues · Vector Embeddings · pgvector · Chrome Extensions · Supabase · Supabase Realtime · Stripe API · Webhook Idempotency · Playwright · WebdriverIO · LambdaTest · Docker · AWS · Swagger/OpenAPI
